prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PT-J6LV-84HT Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 19pc Ultimate Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Gold Pans, Rock Pick Description: The 19pc Gold Panning Prospecting Set is perfect for beginners and kids new to the hobby. An ideal gold panning kit for adults.

Whether you're a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 19pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to properly, and successfully, sort, classify and store recovered gold flakes, gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit.

The ASR Outdoor 19pc gold panning kit includes the following equipment: three glass screw top gold flake collection vials, two magnifying tweezers, one regular 10 inch gold pans, two hand trowel prospectors shovel scoops, two large 14 inch finishing gold pan, a black sand magnetic separator pick up tool, three gold suction water tweezers, a 1/2, 1/8 and 1/12 inch mesh classifying screen. Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled sifting pans and classifier sieves or screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy-duty plastic with unique riffle design and come in a deep green color to help better sift and spot gold.

The classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire that make them rust-resistant and conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional sorting and classifying as needed. And, should you be so lucky to recover gold flakes or gold nuggets from your latest gold mining conquest, reach for the magnifying tweezers, snifter bottles and glass vials; these tools have been thoughtfully selected to include in this gold panning field kit, to help and allow for easy and convenient onsite cleaning, examination and storage of your newly discovered specimens Search Terms: prospecting equipment paydirt screen complete sluice box gold mining beginners kit camping hobby outdoor recreation mining kit Features: - GREAT BEGINNER GOLD PANNING KIT: This 19pc gold panning kit is a great gold prospecting kit for beginners, as it features a wide selection of gold panning tools to learn and use in the field with; the kit intentionally includes two or more of the hand trowel shovel scoops, gold snifter bottles, gold pans, mesh classifier screens and more, so that new hobbyists can work alongside an experienced partner using the same equipment and learn the tricks of the trade - ESSENTIAL GOLD MINING PANS & SCREENS: Essential to a new hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector are reliable sifting pans and classifier screens; constructed from heavy-duty plastic, the included riffled pans come in a deep green to help better sift and spot recovered gold flakes or nuggets; the classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire that is rust-resistant; and notably, both gold panning tools conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional sorting - ROCK PICK HAMMER: A must have if working with any sort of hard bedrock or quartz bearing gold ore, this 20oz hammer features rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel; one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material - POST-RECOVERY CLEAN UP & STORAGE EQUIPMENT: Magnifying tweezers, snifter bottles and glass vials will be convenient to reach for if you're lucky enough to pan some gold, gems or other precious metals; These tools will allow you better to clean, store and examine your newly discovered specimens when on site - QUALITY FIELD TESTED DURABLE TOOLS: All the equipment included in this complete gold panning field kit are made from quality material; from the high impact, durable plastic classifier screens and gold pans, to the metal magnifying tweezers and durable magnetic pick-up tool; all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
